summary.disposition: No Opus performance result exists for this panel. Do not report its zero-filled running summary as a model score.

original_failure.public_error: Required episode MCP was unavailable before the agent ran
original_failure.original_audit_interpretation: The startup receipt did not equal the precommitted set of 12 public MCP tools plus StructuredOutput.
original_failure.observability_limitation: The v2 harness persisted the private raw result only after its startup check, so the rejected receipt was not retained. This ordering is corrected before any successor panel.

root_cause.classification: Claude structured-output schema incompatibility, not an episode-MCP outage
root_cause.finding: With the complete evaluator submission schema, Claude Code exposed all 12 epiagent MCP tools and reported the epiagent server connected, but silently omitted StructuredOutput. The exact-inventory audit therefore produced the broader mcp_unavailable event.
root_cause.trigger: The evaluator schema included constraints that Anthropic documents as unsupported for structured-output grammar compilation, including numeric bounds and maxLength, plus a conditional schema branch.
root_cause.model_attribution: No completed v2 assignment was retained, so the panel cannot support an Opus capability claim.

unscored_diagnostic_evidence.configuration: minimal compatible schema, isolated HOME/config, exact public MCP config
unscored_diagnostic_evidence.result: 13 initialization tools: 12 epiagent MCP tools plus StructuredOutput; sole epiagent server connected; exact claude-opus-4-8 receipt
12 initialization tools: every epiagent MCP tool present and server connected, but StructuredOutput absent

unscored_diagnostic_evidence.configuration: documented provider-compatible schema projection with full-schema trusted revalidation retained
unscored_diagnostic_evidence.result: 13 initialization tools restored; StructuredOutput invoked successfully; sole epiagent server connected; exact claude-opus-4-8 receipt

successor_requirements: Use fresh hidden episodes under a new panel identifier and never reuse v2 assignments.
Precommit the provider-schema projection hash and the unchanged full evaluator-schema hash.
Require all 12 public MCP tools, StructuredOutput, and the sole connected epiagent server in the initialization receipt.
Revalidate provider-structured output against the complete evaluator schema inside the trusted scorer.
Persist the private raw result before classifying a startup failure.
Use a distinct structured_output_unavailable event so a healthy MCP server is not mislabeled.
limitations: The diagnostic calls were unscored synthetic smokes and were not prospectively committed benchmark assignments.
Provider execution was host-networked and non-hermetic.
Model identity was provider-reported, and requested high effort was not independently verifiable.
The v2 public execution label mentions safe mode even though its more specific precommitted invocation contract correctly records safe_mode false; the successor label is corrected.

hash_specification.self_hash_rule: Remove the void_sha256 member, canonicalize the remaining document, and hash those bytes.
